data.name: My Waifu's Stream is Going Viral ‼️😳
data.detailed_description:
My Waifu's Stream is Going Viral ‼️😳 是一款以劇情為核心的網路攝影機直播模擬遊戲，包含戀愛模擬元素，並帶有輕度 NTR 氛圍，背景設定在一個現代且真實的世界。



你將扮演一名男生，當女友為了償還你們的債務開始進行網路攝影機直播時，你成為了她的製作人。在每次直播之間，你們會一起相處、聊天、支持彼此，並影響她的情緒與自信。當直播開始時，你需要管理整場節目，回應觀眾的打賞與請求，提高互動度並幫助頻道成長。你的選擇不僅會影響直播的人氣，也會影響你們之間的關係。



遊戲結合輕度管理玩法、互動直播以及劇情推進，探索野心、信任與誘惑。

⭐ 遊戲特色


🎮 以劇情為導向的網路攝影機模擬遊戲
💬 具有重要選擇的戀愛模擬玩法
📡 根據觀眾打賞觸發行動的互動直播
📈 透過升級、服裝與設備發展頻道
🌆 現代且真實的遊戲世界
🔞 包含成人內容（18+）

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS
  • 處理器: Apple M1 або Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:

  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體

data.name: My Waifu's Stream is Going Viral ‼️😳
data.detailed_description:
My Waifu's Stream is Going Viral ‼️😳 is a narrative-driven webcam streaming simulator with dating sim elements and a light NTR vibe, set in a modern, realistic world.



You play as a guy who becomes his girlfriend's producer when she starts webcam streaming to pay off your debts. Between broadcasts, you hang out with her, chat, support her, and shape her mood and confidence. When the stream goes live, you manage the show by reacting to viewer donations and requests, pushing engagement higher and helping the channel grow. Your choices affect not only the stream’s popularity, but also the relationship itself.



The game blends light management, interactive streaming, and story progression, exploring ambition, trust, and temptation.

⭐ Features


🎮 Narrative-driven webcam simulator
💬 Dating sim with meaningful choices
📡 Interactive live streams with donation-based actions
📈 Channel progression through upgrades, outfits, and equipment
🌆 Modern, realistic setting
🔞 Includes adult (18+) content
